html:
“Heals 20 Health.”

-

Healing Salve is a healing item that recovers 20 Health. It requires 1 Spider Gland, 2 Ashes, and 1 Rock to craft. It is a tier 2 healing item.

Healing Salve may be easier to craft than Honey Poultice, depending on one's resources, as the recipe for the Honey Poultice require Reeds, which are only found in the Marsh biome. Honey Poultice is a tier 3 healing item and heals 30 Health.

Contents

  • 1 Skill Tree (Walter)
    • 1.1 Field Medic
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Skill Tree (Walter)

Field Medic

Walter with the "Field Medic" skill will use the item 50% faster and restore 30 .

Usage

Trivia

  • The Healing Salve was added in the Doorway to Adventure update.
  • According to Wilson, Willow and Wendy, the healing salve stings when applied.
  • A salve is a medical ointment used to protect and promote healing of the skin.

Gallery

  • Healing Salve as seen in the poster for the Doorway to Adventure update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

{{Scrapbook Info|Heals 20 Health.}}
'''Healing Salve''' is a healing item that recovers 20 [[Health]]. It requires 1 [[Spider Gland]], 2 [[Ashes]], and 1 [[Rocks|Rock]] to craft. It is a tier 2 healing item.

Healing Salve may be easier to craft than [[Honey Poultice]], depending on one's resources, as the recipe for the Honey Poultice require [[Reeds]], which are only found in the [[Marsh]] biome. Honey Poultice is a tier 3 healing item and heals 30 Health.

=={{pic|48|Insight}} Skill Tree (Walter)==
==={{PicDark|32|Field Medic}}Field Medic===
[[Walter]] with the "[[Field Medic]]" skill will use the item 50% faster and restore 30 {{hp}}.

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Healing Salve
|count1 = 1
|item2 = Nitre
|count2 = 1
|item3 = Marble
|count3 = 1
|item4 = Slurtle Slime
|count4 = 1
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Slimy Salve}}

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Healing Salve was added in the ''[[Version History|Doorway to Adventure]]'' update.
* According to [[Wilson]], [[Willow]] and [[Wendy]], the healing salve stings when applied.
* A [[wikipedia:Salve|salve]] is a medical ointment used to protect and promote healing of the skin.
